channel.title: Projects on Muhammad Ahmad
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Muhammad Ahmad

item.title: Multi-Label Genre Predictor
item.description: A genre prediction model that given a plot allows the user to predict possible genre for the movie or tv-show.

item.title: FAST Date Sheet Analyser
item.description: This utility allows the students of FAST LHR to input their campus date sheets and dig out their relevant subjects from it.

item.title: Fiscal Count
item.description: A bookkeeping application built as a solution to address accounting and management needs of Aqsa Traders PVT LTD.

item.title: Owlet Run
item.description: An infinite side scroller 2D runner game built in Flutter using the powerful Flame Engine.

item.title: Daily Weather
item.description: A weather application with future forecasts and notifications fulfilling all of your needs.

item.title: Auto-Insta Bot
item.description: An automation bot to automate the workflow of posting multiple instagram feeds and stories for businesses.
